title: Alaticaulia kuhniorum
taxonomy: Alaticaulia kuhniorum is classified as a genus of plants within the family Berberidaceae. This family encompasses a wide range of flowering plants commonly known as barberries. The classification of Alaticaulia kuhniorum places it within the order Ranunculales, which includes other flowering plants such as clematis and water wisteria. As a member of the Berberidaceae family, Alaticaulia kuhniorum is closely related to other barberries found in similar geographic regions. Further classification within the kingdom Plantae and the broader context of plant taxonomy also places Alaticaulia kuhniorum within the larger framework of plant diversity.
